sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97249" key="stroggulo/pleuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρογγῠλό-πλευρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n97249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">round-sided</tr_>, of an eel, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0508.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stratt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
